overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a historic American town during an overcast, stormy day. The character traverses wet cobblestone streets from an open plaza past a moving tram and through narrower commercial streets with mixed architectural styles including a church and Chinese storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with market stalls and hotel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the market stalls

entered.detail: multi-story white stone building with arched windows and red signage reading Hotel Grand
green canvas awning covering wooden market stalls with barrels and crates underneath
tall wooden electrical poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide open town square with wet cobblestone ground under an overcast sky. The Hotel Grand building dominates the left side while green market canopies appear ahead. The area is sparsely populated with a few distant horse carriages.

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the cobblestone street
black tram with red stripes passes from left to right across the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street to navigate around the passing tram and continue down the road

notable_agents.action: tram moving from left to right across the intersection, blocking the path temporarily

entered.detail: black electric tram with red trim and advertisements on the side
white two-story building with wooden balcony and signage reading Armstrong and Price Sailmaker

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the cobblestone street as a black tram passes left to right. The Hotel Grand recedes behind as the character approaches the Armstrong and Price building. A white horse-drawn carriage waits on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with restaurant signage and residential balconies

events.description: enters narrower street with overhead balconies, awnings, and denser building facades

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow street passing under wooden balconies and awnings

notable_agents.action: person in tan coat walking away from camera down the center of the street

entered.detail: large red rectangular sign with white text reading Jade Dragon Restaurant suspended over the street
iron-wrought balconies with potted plants on second floor of buildings
large mature trees with green canopies lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower, more enclosed street with the red Jade Dragon Restaurant sign visible ahead. The character walks under wooden balconies and past iron fences while trees become visible in the distance. A pedestrian in a tan coat walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: church district with Chinese storefronts and stone architecture

events.description: character slows and turns right toward the building entrance with Chinese signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the church, then turning to face a building with Chinese signage

notable_agents.action: man in blue uniform walking past the character on the left
woman in red shirt standing near the doorway of the Chinese restaurant

entered.detail: large stone church with arched stained glass windows and pointed architecture
vertical red and gold Chinese characters on dark wooden panels beside doorways
black ornate street lamp with clock face mounted on red pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a large gothic church on the right and enters an area with Chinese storefronts featuring vertical signage. The street becomes more crowded with pedestrians. The character approaches a building with red doors and Chinese characters, then turns to face the entrance as a woman in red stands nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic town that shifts from a wide, open plaza into a dense, culturally diverse commercial district under a stormy sky. It begins in a spacious town square with wet cobblestones and the Hotel Grand looming to the left, moving past green market canopies and distant carriages. As the character crosses the street, the open space narrows and the Hotel Grand recedes, replaced by the Armstrong and Price building while a black tram passes across the frame. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed street lined with wooden balconies and iron fences, following a pedestrian in a tan coat toward the red sign of the Jade Dragon Restaurant. Finally, the camera passes a large gothic church and enters a crowded area of Chinese storefronts with vertical signage, ending as the character turns toward a building with red doors where a woman in red stands waiting.
